title: Connected textures for Fabric Seasons Extras
description: Connected textures support for Fabric Seasons Extras greenhouse glass. Uses Continuity.
body:
# CTM support for Fabric Seasons: Extras

This resourcepack adds support for connected textures for [Fabric Seasons: Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-extras) using [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

Multiple variants are available for each vanilla plank type, but that list could be expanded in the future.

All textures are procedurally generated from vanilla textures and slightly differ from the original mod by not including glass outline inside (can be added in the future if needed).

_This resourcepack does **not** add any new blocks or crafting recipes._ It only changes textures of Greenhouse Glass, **no matter what planks were used when crafting them**.
